hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read fp; blocked=false; for pattern in package-lock.json pnpm-lock.yaml yarn.lock .git/ node_modules/ dist/ .next/ build/; do case "$fp" in *"$pattern"*) blocked=true;; esac; done; case "$fp" in *.env|*.env.local|*.env.production|*.env.development) blocked=true;; esac; if $blocked; then echo "BLOCKED: Writing to $fp is not allowed." >&2; exit 2; fi; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; branch=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push' && echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^(main|master)$'; then echo "BLOCKED: Never push directly to $branch. Use a feature branch and PR." >&2; exit 2; fi; } || true

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'console\.log\|console\.debug' 2>/dev/null | head -10 | { files=$(cat); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "WARNING: Debug statements in modified files:" >&2; echo "$files" >&2; fi; } || true
